title: HIGH SCHOOL ACCESS TRANSIT PROGRAM - 211info
text: TRIMET OPERATIONS CENTER HIGH SCHOOL ACCESS TRANSIT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides TriMet passes to high school and GED students for the summer while supplies last. The passes are good for unlimited rides on buses, MAX Light Rail Service, Westside Express Service, and Portland Streetcar. 4012 SE 17th Avenue Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Ages 14-19 who are currently pursuing a high school diploma or GED Hours: Students can pick up a pass from their high school main office beginning in late May. Passes are valid from June through August. Email (503) 238-7433 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Customer Service (503) 238-7433 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or walk in for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Student ID card AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Transportation Passes * High School Students If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TRIMET OPERATIONS CENTER
